bear.narrative: revenue miss, decelerating growth, tighter cost of capital

base.narrative: consensus delivers, growth normalises to GDP+

bull.narrative: revenue beat, operating leverage, rate-easing tailwind

sensitivity.note: WACC dominates — ±100 bps WACC moves base IV by ±17% (vs ±14% for terminal g, ±9% for Y2–5 CAGR)

position_sizing.rationale: WATCH × WITHIN BEAR-BASE (price $603.00 vs base IV $1050.50, MoS +74.2%) → 2–3% band; MEDIUM confidence cap of 4% upper not binding.

signal.qualitative_note: AI optionality premium 15.9% (AI capex ~$48.8B × 5× proxy / $1,531B mcap) — proportionate to core business value

quality_signals.piotroski_note: Canonical Piotroski F-Score not computable from current yf MCP get_financials surface (missing total_assets, current_assets/liabilities, long-term debt split, gross_profit, operating_cash_flow, historical share counts). See ABA-70.

magic_formula.roic_note: ROIC not computable from current yf MCP surface (canonical denominator requires total_assets, current_assets/liabilities, intangibles). See ABA-70.

screen.rationale: Quality ratio 3/9 = 33% (below 55% WATCH cutoff) triggers SKIP despite Magic Formula PASS (single-ticker EY 5.27% > 5% threshold; ROIC N/A — MCP-constrained per ABA-70); FY2025 vs FY2024 shows NI declining (60.5B vs 62.4B), FCF declining (46.1B vs 54.1B), op-margin contracting (41.4% vs 42.2%), total debt rising 71% (49.1B→83.9B), cash shrinking (35.9B vs 43.9B), and SBC intensity edging up — only profitability/FCF existence and topline growth remain positive.

timing.sue_caveat: 4-quarter std-dev is statistically weaker than the 8-quarter window used in the academic literature; treat SUE > 1.5 as the noise floor for v1.
timing.rationale: SUE 0.94 is below the 1.5 v1 noise floor (driven by the FY2025-Q3 -84% miss inflating sample std-dev to ~4.01 even though Q1-2026 surprise was +$3.78); PEAD still nominally IN WINDOW (day 43 of 60) but the surprise quality is mixed; revision direction N/A (yf MCP get_revisions tool not implemented, ABA-68); estimated catalyst ~47 days out (period-end + 90d, ABA-69) — no override fires. Verdict NEUTRAL: ACT NOW unreachable without revisions, no decisive WAIT FOR BETTER ENTRY trigger.
